title: Screencopy
description: Let's you copy screenshot to clipboard.
body:
# Screencopy
#### Requires [Cloth Config](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Fabric API (if using fabric)](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
This is a client-side mod that lets you copy screenshots to your clipboard, you just need to press ``F2`` like you usually do in Minecraft.

It works in macOS, Linux (X11 or Wayland) and Windows that uses x64 or arm64. Also there is a config file for not saving the file to the screenshots folder if that's your preference!

This mod shouldn't be incompatible with any mod (including optifine) but do report it in the issues section ;)
